entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A major grain legume grown in the tropics and subtropics, known for high protein content.

entities.name: TROPICS AND SUBTROPICS
entities.description: The global regions where pigeonpea is primarily grown.

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional attribute of pigeonpea that makes it a significant component of the diet.

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The potential and realized productivity of pigeonpea crops.

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors including pests and environmental stress that limit pigeonpea yields.

entities.name: MARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: Low productivity areas where pigeonpea is commonly cultivated.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Biotic constraints that cause substantial damage to pigeonpea production.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional crop improvement strategies used to enhance seed quality and reduce maturity duration.

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: A characteristic of pigeonpea improved through conventional breeding.

entities.name: CROP MATURITY DURATION
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, which has been reduced via conventional breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Biological materials needed for the genetic improvement of pigeonpea.

entities.name: SEXUAL BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological obstacles between cultivated and wild species that restrict genetic improvement.

entities.name: CULTIVATED AND WILD SPECIES
entities.description: The different types of pigeonpea species involved in breeding and genetic barriers.

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: Technology used to overcome constraints and integrate with conventional breeding for crop improvement.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Emerging genetic technologies aimed at the improvement of the pigeonpea crop.

entities.name: BIOSAFETY
entities.description: Safety considerations related to the application of transgenic technology in pigeonpea.

entities.name: IPR ISSUES
entities.description: Intellectual Property Rights issues associated with the application of transgenic technology.
